title: Chapters from My Autobiography
summaries: "Chapters from My Autobiography" by Mark Twain is a collection of autobiographical pieces published between 1906 and 1907. Rather than following a traditional structure, Twain presents rambling anecdotes and reflections on his life, family, and career. He shares memories of his early publishing experiences, pays tribute to his beloved wife and daughter Susy, and explores his siblings' lives. Much of the work was dictated, creating an intimate, conversational tone that captures Twain's distinctive voice and personality. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
